title: Lycopodioides tenerrima
taxonomy: Lycopodioides tenerrima is classified within the plant family Lycopodiaceae. This family belongs to the order Lycopodiales, which is part of the class Lycopodiopsida. The class Lycopodiopsida is a group of vascular plants that are commonly known as club mosses. Lycopodioides tenerrima, along with other species in the Lycopodiaceae family, exhibits characteristics typical of this group, such as simple, needle-like leaves and a lack of true roots. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics of Lycopodioides tenerrima with other vascular plants.
